name: rm-studio
description: The all-in-one orchestrator for Remotion Studio — take a plain-language brief (or data, or an existing clip, or a freeform motion idea) and produce a finished, on-brand MP4 by walking the full production chain (concept then script then storyboard then voiceover then build then validate then render then preview). It routes the request to its JTBD front-end, runs each granular rm-* skill's scripts in order, reads their numbered artifacts, advances state.md, and writes 06-summary.md; it does NOT re-implement them. Use as the DEFAULT entry point for "make me a video / explainer / data video / social cut / animate this idea" and for re-entry on a finished project (restyle, resize, re-voice, re-render) on frozen upstream facts. The render is KEYLESS and local (Remotion → Chrome Headless Shell + FFmpeg, no cloud, no Lambda, no auth); ai-gen supplies only voiceover/ASR/matte.

inputs.name: brief
inputs.description: The video request — a plain-language brief/script/topic, a source URL, a data file (CSV/JSON), an existing media clip path, or a freeform "animate X" idea. Its shape picks which JTBD front-end the chain starts with.

inputs.name: aspect-ratios
inputs.description: Any of 16:9, 9:16, 1:1 (space/comma separated). Default = the onboarding/context default, else 16:9 (9:16 for a JTBD-3 social cut).

inputs.name: voice
inputs.description: A Kokoro voice id (e.g. am_michael, af_nova) for the voiceover. Default = the context default voice, else am_michael.

inputs.name: music
inputs.description: on or off — whether to add a background music bed. Default = the context default, else off.

inputs.name: quality
inputs.description: draft | standard | high — the render quality. Default draft for previews; standard for the final deliverable.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: Output file stem for the MP4s (exports/[name]-[ar].mp4). Default = the project slug.

outputs.name: concept
outputs.description: The 6-dimension base concept (subject, composition, style, palette+hex, typography, mood) produced by rm-concept.

outputs.name: script
outputs.description: The beat-structured VO + on-screen text (provenance-faithful) produced by rm-script — the only phase that sets facts.

outputs.name: storyboard
outputs.description: Per-beat Remotion-block plan (primitives / library presets / [TransitionSeries] / @remotion/* / track + frame ranges) produced by rm-storyboard.

outputs.name: timing
outputs.description: Word-level voiceover timestamps (@remotion/captions-shaped) produced by rm-voiceover (alongside assets/vo/*.wav).

outputs.name: project
outputs.description: The per-project Remotion (React) app authored by rm-build (bundled starter + harvested engine + official skills + generated src/ + props.json), conforming to the frozen composition contract.

outputs.name: validation
outputs.description: The version-skew + tsc + contract-lint + still-render + vision verdict produced by rm-validate (plus key stills in snapshots/).

outputs.name: videos
outputs.description: One verified, on-brand H.264 MP4 per requested aspect ratio — the finished deliverable, rendered keyless+local by rm-render (frames in exports/frames/).

outputs.name: preview
outputs.description: An @remotion/player live scrubbable preview produced by rm-preview (Remotion-unique; lets the look be checked before/without a full render).

outputs.name: summary
outputs.description: The run summary rm-studio writes — resolved parameters (voice, style, palette, ARs, quality, music), per-phase artifact paths, the per-frame vision verdict, and any fallback taken.
